markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI content scaling service for Vanco's marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Vanco's Need:** Vanco requires a scalable content solution for two sites post-January's business unit split. A key challenge is manually updating existing content, which is more time-consuming than creating new content.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Offer:** GrowthX proposed an end-to-end service: strategy, creation (5 articles/week), and publishing. The model is a hybrid of AI workflows and expert oversight to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Strategic Mismatch:** GrowthX's model builds workflows on its proprietary platform, while Vanco's AI Governance Board requires a "closed loop" solution built directly within Vanco's secure, internal infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** GrowthX will provide a detailed workflow demo to clarify how Vanco could leverage the partnership's outputs (artifacts, assignments) for internal use, addressing the strategic mismatch.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

## Topics

### Vanco's Content Scaling Challenge

  - [**Current Process:** Jordan manually uses prompt sequences and GPTs for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Primary Bottleneck:** Manually updating existing content is more time-consuming than creating new content.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Automation Blocker:** Vanco's AI Governance Board prevents direct HubSpot integrations with LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude), forcing manual publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Strategic Context:** A business unit split in January creates two sites:](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Existing Site:** Faith & Nonprofit content.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**New Site:** Education content (new domain, requires rapid authority building).](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Increase comparative content for high-converting, lower-volume keywords, especially for the EDU market.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Service Model:** An end-to-end partner for SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Methodology:** A hybrid model using proprietary AI workflows with expert oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**AI:** Uses agentic research, custom knowledge graphs, and multiple LLMs (e.g., Perplexity, Claude, specialized tools like Tavly).](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Experts:** A dedicated team (Managing Director, Editor, Content Manager) ensures quality and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week sprint):** SEO/GEO audit, strategy, roadmap, and \~10 articles to calibrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** 5 articles per week, with work split across Vanco's two sites.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** $30k (startups) or $40k (enterprises).](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** $15k/month for 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Current:** Uses a Scrunch dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Future (Jan 2026):** Launching a proprietary platform, with access retained by clients post-contract.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)

### Strategic Mismatch: Infrastructure Ownership

  - [**Vanco's Requirement:** A "closed loop" solution built within Vanco's secure, internal infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Security concerns (payments industry) and a desire to build long-term, transferable internal capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Model:** Workflows are built and run on GrowthX's proprietary platform.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [**Client Deliverables:** Vanco would own the content, artifacts (e.g., persona docs), and assignment roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
      - [**Workflow Access:** Workflows are not exportable but can be transparently explained.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Jen Hoitsma expressed that a partnership would be more compelling if it involved building the infrastructure *in Vanco's environment*, not just delivering content.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
      - [Confirm data access policy for clients post-contract.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [Send Vanco a list of tools used in GrowthX's workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Provide a detailed demo of GrowthX's workflows to clarify how Vanco could leverage the partnership's outputs (artifacts, assignments) for internal use.](https://fathom.video/share/pQ1yi3bcGgCam5vRGy1ZB5dsb-PB915V?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
